CustomField.description: Score based on if any of the four billing call dates are in the future (ie. greater than or equal to today).
CustomField.formula: IF( OR( Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c >= TODAY(), Billing_Check_In_Call_Date__c >= TODAY(), Billing_Extra_Help_Call_Date__c >= TODAY(), Billing_Wrap_Call_Date__c >= TODAY() ), -10, 0 )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Score based on if any of the four billing call dates are in the future (ie. greater than or equal to today).
CustomField.label: Future Billing Call Score
